# Tag

A tag/chip component for labeling, categorizing, or filtering items. Supports closable behavior and custom elements.

## Import

```jsx
import { Tag } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `variant` | `"subtle" \| "solid" \| "surface" \| "outline" \| "plain"` | `"subtle"` | The visual style variant. |
| `size` | `"sm" \| "md" \| "lg"` | `"md"` | The size of the tag. |
| `colorPalette` | `string` | `"gray"` | The color palette for the tag. |
| `startElement` | `ReactNode` | - | Element rendered before the tag label. |
| `endElement` | `ReactNode` | - | Element rendered after the tag label. |
| `closable` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the tag shows a close button. |
| `onClose` | `() => void` | - | Callback fired when the close button is clicked. |

## Usage

### Basic Tag

```jsx
<Tag>Default Tag</Tag>
```

### Tag Variants

```jsx
<Tag variant="solid" colorPalette="blue">Solid</Tag>
<Tag variant="subtle" colorPalette="green">Subtle</Tag>
<Tag variant="surface" colorPalette="red">Surface</Tag>
<Tag variant="outline" colorPalette="purple">Outline</Tag>
```

### Closable Tag

```jsx
<Tag closable onClose={() => console.log("closed")}>
  Removable
</Tag>
```

### Tag with Icons

```jsx
import { LuUser } from "react-icons/lu";

<Tag startElement={<LuUser />} colorPalette="blue">
  John Doe
</Tag>
```

### Tag Sizes

```jsx
<Tag size="sm">Small</Tag>
<Tag size="md">Medium</Tag>
<Tag size="lg">Large</Tag>
```
